subcodes.first_line: O friends of God! Be ye engaged in His remembrance and rejoice in His memory, for true joy and delight consist in [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دوستان الهی بذکرش مشغول و بیادش مسرور باشید چه که بهجت و سرور در حقیقت
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @love of God, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @praise and encouragement
